scripts.db:users: docker exec -i shop-db-1 psql -U user -d shop -f /app/features/users/user.table.sql
scripts.db:products: docker exec -i shop-db-1 psql -U user -d shop -f /app/features/products/product.table.sql
scripts.db:orders: docker exec -i shop-db-1 psql -U user -d shop -f /app/features/orders/order.table.sql
scripts.db:cart: docker exec -i shop-db-1 psql -U user -d shop -f /app/features/cart/cart.table.sql
scripts.db:init: npm run db:users && npm run db:products && npm run db:orders && npm run db:cart
